_doc: Calibration regression test set. Each entry is a (species, zone, stage) anchor with an expected peak DOY and a tolerance (days). Sources are authoritative single-zone or strongly-zone-anchored references — USDA Forest Service Silvics for native trees, regional foraging blogs explicitly for the cited zone, university extension fact sheets, NOAA first-frost climatology for frost-driven species. The runner queries the synthesized peak_doy on each row and asserts |peak - expected| <= tolerance. New entries added when we find authoritative pinning evidence; entries with broader uncertainty get larger tolerances.

tests.source: USDA Forest Service Silvics + NOAA first-frost climatology (zone 5a first frost ~Sep 26 = DOY 269)
tests.notes: Beech is frost-driven: nuts drop after first hard frost. Per NOAA 1991-2020 normals, zone 5a first frost is ~Sep 26.

tests.source: USDA Forest Service Silvics + NOAA first-frost
tests.notes: Zone 7b first frost ~Nov 1 = DOY 305

tests.source: USDA Silvics + foraging guides ("wait for first frost" canon)
tests.notes: Frost-driven: drops after first frost. Zone 6a first frost ~Oct 10 = DOY 283; persimmon often clings 7-14d after frost so peak ~290-297.

tests.source: USDA Silvics + Practical Self Reliance + foraging guides
tests.notes: Husks blacken and drop ~7d before first frost. Zone 6a: 283-7=276 (Oct 3).
Husks split at first frost; drops fall. Zone 5a first frost ~Sep 26.

tests.source: USDA Silvics + Eat The Weeds + NOAA first-frost
tests.notes: Earliest of chestnut family, drops ~25d before first frost. Zone 7a: 297-25=272 (Sep 29).
Aug-Sep harvest, ~14d before first frost. Zone 5a: 269-14=255 (Sep 12).
Ashley Adamant: "harvest peaks late July to early August in zones 4a-5a". Late July = ~210, early Aug = ~220, midpoint ~215.
MA mid-to-late summer (Jul-Aug). Peak ~Aug 1 = DOY 213.

tests.source: Philadelphia metro (POP Harvest Guide) + iNat zone 7a empirical
tests.notes: Mid-Atlantic peak mid-July ~DOY 195 (Jul 14).
Sap flow peaks late Feb-early Mar in zone 5a (freeze-thaw cycle). DOY 60 = Mar 1.
Colder zones, sap runs later. Zone 4a peak ~Mar 16.
Mid-July harvest peak in zone 6a. DOY 207 = Jul 26.
Maine wild blueberry harvest typically late Jul-early Aug. Peak ~Aug 1 = DOY 213.

tests.source: KSU Pawpaw Program + Ohio State Extension
tests.notes: Pawpaw harvest mid-Sep in zone 6a. DOY 258 = Sep 15.
Late Aug ripe in zone 5a. DOY 237 = Aug 25.
Elderflower harvest ~Jun 22 in zone 5a.
Late June peak in zone 6a. DOY 175 = Jun 24.
Spring ephemeral; peak harvest mid-late April in zone 5a. DOY 110 = Apr 20.

tests.source: Cornell Cooperative Extension + Concord grape harvest data
tests.notes: Concord-type fox grape peak ~early Sep. DOY 252 = Sep 9.
